channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'I wouldn't even be able to afford the speaker stands' — two big-name audiophile brands just went head-to-head to release the best elite hi-fi tower speaker
item.description: Sonus faber and Focal have both revealed new floor-standing speakers, but only one company had the thought to release an affordable model too.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for July 2, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.
